text: American Express delivered record-breaking Q3 2025 results, lifting full-year guidance on strong business momentum. Q3 2025 revenue reached $10.415 billion, representing 0.91% year-over-year growth from the Q3 2024 base period. Net income for Q3 2025 was $2.902 billion, up 0.59% year-over-year, yielding a net margin of 27.86%. The company's financial performance has been characterized as record-breaking alongside peers in the 2025 Q3 earnings cycle, which has been largely positive overall.
